scripts.embeddings: GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS=resource/credentials/credentials.json GOOGLE_PROJECT_ID=himart-cdp GOOGLE_LOCATION=us-central1 node scripts/generate-embeddings.js && GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS=resource/credentials/credentials.json GOOGLE_PROJECT_ID=himart-cdp GOOGLE_LOCATION=us-central1 node scripts/generate-local-embeddings.js
scripts.embeddings:force: GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS=resource/credentials/credentials.json GOOGLE_PROJECT_ID=himart-cdp GOOGLE_LOCATION=us-central1 node scripts/generate-embeddings.js --force && GOOGLE_APPLICATION_CREDENTIALS=resource/credentials/credentials.json GOOGLE_PROJECT_ID=himart-cdp GOOGLE_LOCATION=us-central1 node scripts/generate-local-embeddings.js --force
